headline: 1 Profitable Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Not all profitable companies are built to last - some rely on outdated models or unsustainable advantages. Just because a business is in the green today doesn’t mean it will thrive tomorrow.

content.title: 1 Profitable Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 We Brush Off

headline: United and Chef's Table Bring Together World-Renowned Chefs to Create New, Exclusive Inflight Meals
summary: United is teaming up with Chef's Table, the brand behind the award-winning Netflix series, to introduce 10 new, exclusive meal experiences to its United Polaris® international business class menu. The airline has enlisted 11 world-renowned chefs from four continents – representing United's seven U.S. hub cities and key international gateways in London, Tokyo and São Paulo – to curate regionally-inspired meals.

content.title: United and Chef's Table Bring Together World-Renowned Chefs to Create New, Exclusive Inflight Meals

headline: Airlines might not even flinch at rising fuel costs, airfare: Expert
summary: US airline operators — including American (AAL), United (UAL), Delta (DAL), Southwest (LUV), and JetBlue Airways (JBLU) — are coming under pressure this week as Middle East tensions continue to pressure oil prices (CL=F, BZ=F), threatening to send jet fuel costs soaring. This comes after a partial government shutdown has led to massive slowdowns at major airports' TSA checkpoints (Transportation Security Administration). Steve Trent, an independent aviation specialist, comes on Market Catalysts to discuss what this all means for travel demand trends and airfare prices. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Catalysts.

headline: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (UAL) Target Cut to $110 at Redburn Amid Fuel Cost Concerns
summary: United Airlines Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:UAL) is among the 12 Best Very Cheap Stocks to Buy in 2026.
